name: Arundhati Kirkire
profileSummary: Arundhati Kirkire is an Indian former cricketer who played as a right-handed batter and occasional wicket-keeper. She appeared in one Test match and 30 One Day Internationals for India between 2000 and 2005. Her highest WODI score is 106 and she also has one half-century in the one-day version of the sport. She played domestic cricket for Madhya Pradesh and Railways.
